items.title: Spot Prices Wrap: Pipeline Maintenance, Demand Shifts Mask Diverging Natural Gas Cash Trends
items.summary: Spot natural gas prices for Tuesday delivery diverged across major U.S. hubs as shifting weather forecasts unevenly shaped regional demand.

items.title: Futures Settle: Spring Demand Loss, Easing Global Risk Premium Drive Gas Sell-Off
items.summary: April Nymex natural gas futures fell Monday as easing Middle East tensions triggered a broad risk-off move across energy markets, while weak domestic supply-demand fundamentals reinforced downside pressure.

items.title: TotalEnergies Redirects $928M From U.S. Offshore Wind to LNG, Natural Gas Production
items.summary: TotalEnergies SE has inked an agreement with the federal government valued at $928 million billion that the French supermajor expects to accelerate the Rio Grande and Alaska LNG projects.

items.title: MidDay Snapshot: Henry Hub Cash Sinks as Milder Weather, Middle East Diplomacy Cool Markets
items.summary: Natural gas spot prices retreated at benchmark Henry Hub on Monday as warming domestic forecasts and reduced Middle East tensions pressured the market.

items.title: Venture Global Plans to Pursue More Short-Term Supply Deals as LNG Output Grows
items.summary: Venture Global Inc. announced a rare short-term deal to sell global commodities trader Vitol Inc. 1.5 million tons/year of LNG beginning in 2026.

items.title: U.S. Natural Gas ‘Superpower’ Status in Focus as Iran War Spurs Market Swings
items.summary: U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) Secretary Chris Wright said the Trump administration would continue to hone in on natural gas infrastructure and production as a key defense against price volatility as the world continues to react to escalating impact

items.title: Heating Demand Return Likely Reduces Lower 48 Natural Gas Storage Surplus
items.summary: NGI is estimating the latest U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report through the week ended Mar. 20 to show a withdrawal of 43 Bcf.

items.title: Global Natural Gas Prices Fall on Diplomacy Hopes, but LNG Disruptions Deepen
items.summary: Global natural gas prices retreated Monday after President Trump said the United States would postpone attacks on Iranian energy infrastructure.

items.title: MidDay Futures: Natural Gas Dips Below $3 as Trump Signals 5-Day Iran Truce
items.summary: Natural gas futures stuttered to start the week as energy markets responded to the news of a potential thaw in the Middle East war that has damaged Qatari LNG infrastructure and squeezed global oil and gas supplies.

items.title: What Natural Gas End Users Should Focus on as Fundamentals Shift
items.summary: Growing demand from LNG terminals, industrials, petrochemicals and electric power generation has forced certain end users to adjust their strategies to ensure consistent natural gas deliveries and competitive market pricing.

items.title: Trump’s Iran Pause Triggers Oil Selloff and a Safe-Haven Reset

items.title: Ecuador’s Broken Oil Industry Faces Violent Headwinds
items.summary: The once peaceful South American nation of Ecuador is being rocked by cocaine related violence. Since the 2020 pandemic, the tiny country’s murder rate has spiraled higher, hitting an all-time high of nearly 51 murders per 100,000 people during 2025.

items.title: U.S. Energy Dominance Agenda Can't Shield Driver From Higher Gasoline Prices

items.title: China’s Sinopec not Buying Iranian Crude despite U.S. Waiver
items.summary: Chinese state oil giant Sinopec, Asia’s biggest refiner by capacity, will not buy Iranian oil even after the U.S. waiver on purchases of crude from Iran loaded on tankers as of March 20, a senior Sinopec executive said on Monday.      Sinopec, offici

items.title: Europe’s Gasoline Exports Shift to Asia as War Roils Fuel Markets
items.summary: Europe’s gasoline exports have started to increasingly shift to Asia in recent weeks as the crude supply shock in the Middle East is tightening Asian fuel supply.  Europe usually ships most of its exported gasoline to the United States, West Africa,
